# Lars Roettig

Lars Roettig is a Senior Technical Architect at Adobe, based in Bavaria, Germany.
He has worked at Adobe since August 2022 across two roles:
- Adobe Commerce Technical Architect (Aug 2022 – Feb 2025)
- Senior Technical Architect, AI focus (Feb 2025 – present)

## About

Lars builds AI agents, LLM integrations, and technical architecture for creative
workflows at Adobe scale. Before Adobe he spent 8 years as a software engineer
and architect at TechDivision GmbH, working on large Magento/e-commerce platforms
and serving as a maintainer on the Magento PWA Core Team.

## Expertise

- AI agents and LLM integration in production systems
- Technical architecture for large-scale web platforms
- Adobe Commerce (formerly Magento) architecture
- RAG systems and vector search (turbovec, LangChain, LlamaIndex)
- Rust and Tauri desktop application development
- Next.js, TypeScript, React, Python

## Projects

- ThoughtForge: local-first AI planning assistant built with Tauri + Rust + React.
  Extracts action items from meeting transcripts, manages tasks on a kanban board,
  uses a local LLM via LM Studio, and ships a built-in MCP server for Claude Desktop.
  Source: https://github.com/larsroettig/thoughtforge

## Writing

Lars writes about AI engineering, RAG, vector search, agent architecture, and
practical software development at https://larsroettig.me/blog

Recent posts:
- What I Learned Building AI Agents
- turbovec: Local RAG Without the 31 GB Tax
- ThoughtForge: What I Learned Building a Local AI Planning App

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://larsroettig.me
- GitHub: https://github.com/larsroettig
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/larsroettig
- Location: Bavaria, Germany
